label: River
description: Defines a river tier in the world generation system, including spawn thresholds, visual widths, degradation rules, and branching behavior at junctions.

spawnFlowThreshold.label: Spawn flow threshold
spawnFlowThreshold.description: Minimum accumulated flow value required for this river tier to spawn during world generation. A value of -1 means no threshold (never spawned by flow alone).

spawnChance.label: Spawn chance
spawnChance.description: Probability (0.0 to 1.0) that this river spawns when flow meets the threshold.

degradeThreshold.label: Degrade threshold
degradeThreshold.description: Flow level below which this river degrades into degradeChild.

degradeChild.label: Degrade child
degradeChild.description: River tier this river degrades into when flow falls below degradeThreshold.

branches.label: Branches
branches.description: List of potential tributary rivers that may branch off at junctions, each controlled by a minimum flow level and spawn probability.

widthOnWorld.label: Width on world
widthOnWorld.description: Visual width of this river on the world map.

widthOnMap.label: Width on map
widthOnMap.description: Width of this river in local map cells.

debugOpacity.label: Debug opacity
debugOpacity.description: Opacity of the debug overlay drawn for this river tier. Only visible with developer mode enabled.

basic-river.label: Basic river
basic-river.description: Minimal river with a label, world-map width, and local-map width.

basic-river-with-degradation.label: Basic river with degradation
basic-river-with-degradation.description: River that degrades into a smaller tier when flow drops below a threshold.
